strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is from older robotics projects
Cloud experience centers on AWS CDK; no clear Kubernetes-in-production or GCP/Azure signal beyond GISCollective self-hosting
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer whose primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and current focus on AI-agent infrastructure align closely with the role's core needs. Gaps exist around Nest.js specifically and recent Kotlin/Java work, but the breadth of languages, long testing/craftsmanship track record, and relevant agentic tooling experience suggest strong overall fit for a mid-senior fullstack position.
